title: Halloween Tweaks
description: Small and minor halloween-related tweaks to make your game spookier!
body:
# 🎃 **Happy Halloween!** 🎃

Halloween Tweaks is a special, stylized datapack made for the spookiest day of the year!
 This datapack includes some minor features, listed below:

- 🎃 **All mobs who have a head slot will have a 60% chance to wear a specialty in their head> These specialties can be: pumpkins, carved pumpkins or jack o' lanterns!**
  - There is a 15% chance that the carved pumpkin/jack o' lantern will be enchanted
- 🎃 **Carved pumpkins and jack o' lanterns will have a low chance to appear randomly through out the world near players**
  - Pumpkins will only ever be placed on air blocks
 
- 🎃 **Bats will sometimes randomly spawn near players' locations**
  - These bats can spawn in any light level
  - These bats despawn after ~2 minutes

##  

This datapack was made by Wilozyx with ❤️
